title: Temperature Converter
description: Create functions to convert between Celsius and Fahrenheit.
problemStatement:
Convert between temperature scales using modular functions.

1. Write a function `c_to_f(celsius)` that converts Celsius to Fahrenheit: `(c * 9/5) + 32`.
2. Write a function `f_to_c(fahrenheit)` that converts Fahrenheit to Celsius: `(f - 32) * 5/9`.

Test both functions and print the results rounded to 1 decimal place.
hints: The formula for C to F is `(C * 1.8) + 32`.
The formula for F to C is `(F - 32) / 1.8`.
